summary: Tenant Isolation Hardening (P0 #3) testing complete. All 41 unit tests and 13 API tests pass. Backend-only task verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant Isolation Hardening (P0 #3) is complete. TenantScopedRepository enforces organization_id in all queries. Admin API endpoints at /api/admin/tenant-isolation/* are protected (super_admin only). Exception handlers for TenantIsolationError subclasses return 403. All 41 unit tests + 13 API tests pass.
features_verified: GET /api/admin/tenant-isolation/health — returns health score and collection audit (super admin only)
GET /api/admin/tenant-isolation/violations — lists tenant isolation violations (super admin only)
POST /api/admin/tenant-isolation/ensure-indexes — creates organization_id indexes on tenant-scoped collections
Non-super-admin users get 'Super admin only' error on all tenant isolation admin endpoints
TenantScopedRepository enforces organization_id in all queries (find, update, delete, aggregate)
Cross-tenant access (org_alpha trying to query org_beta) raises TenantFilterBypassAttempt
with_tenant_filter defaults to strict mode (no legacy fallback)
